## Linked Issue

## Changelog Impact

- [ ] No changelog entry expected.
- [ ] Uses a `feat/fix/perf/breaking` commit or equivalent squash commit title.

## Release Impact

- [ ] No release behavior changes.
- [ ] Release behavior changes are covered by dry-run output and rollback tests or notes.
- [ ] npm package or workflow changes were checked against the packed artifacts.

## Security And Supply Chain

- [ ] Does not change command execution, path handling, credential handling, release artifacts, or provenance.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes are explained and follow `SECURITY.md` when private disclosure is involved.
- [ ] npm wrapper, platform package, workflow, or provenance changes were checked or explained.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run check`
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or docs were updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented when it changes.
- [ ] Skipped verification is explained above.
